# Agent Atlas

> Search and research the open web for your AI agent. Agent Atlas installs, health-checks, and routes free upstream tools across 10 Western channels. It is not a scraper — after install, agents call upstream CLIs directly (Jina, Exa/mcporter, yt-dlp, gh, twitter-cli, OpenCLI, feedparser).

## Quick Start

- [Installation Guide](https://github.com/batu3384/agent-atlas/blob/main/docs/install.md): Step-by-step setup for AI agents and humans
- [README](https://github.com/batu3384/agent-atlas/blob/main/README.md): Product overview
- [Tier 1 login channels](https://github.com/batu3384/agent-atlas/blob/main/docs/tier1.md): Twitter, Reddit, LinkedIn, OpenCLI bridge

## Core Commands

- `agent-atlas doctor --json` — which channels are ready and which backend is active
- `agent-atlas smoke` — one real research call per ready channel
- `agent-atlas install` — install Tier 0 tools + register SKILL.md
- Agents then call upstream tools directly (see platforms.md)

## Key Features

- Read any URL via Jina Reader
- Web search via Exa (mcporter MCP, free hosted endpoint)
- YouTube transcripts via yt-dlp
- GitHub search/view via `gh`
- RSS via feedparser
- Twitter/X via twitter-cli (Chrome profile cookies) or OpenCLI
- Reddit / LinkedIn via OpenCLI (+ LinkedIn public pages via Jina)
- Facebook / Instagram supported but optional (`disabled_channels`)
- Self-diagnosis + research smoke tests
- Zero China-only platforms by design (no Bilibili / Xiaohongshu / etc.)

## Optional

- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/batu3384/agent-atlas/blob/main/SKILL.md): Integration guide for Cursor / Claude Code / agentskills.io
- [Platforms](https://github.com/batu3384/agent-atlas/blob/main/docs/platforms.md): Backend routing table
